mapper.insert: INSERT INTO certifications (resume_id, name, issuing_organization, issue_date, expiry_date, credential_id, credential_url, sort_order) VALUES (#{resumeId}, #{name}, #{issuingOrganization}, #{issueDate}, #{expiryDate}, #{credentialId}, #{credentialUrl}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM certifications WHERE id = #{id} AND resume_id = #{resumeId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, resume_id, name, issuing_organization, issue_date, expiry_date, credential_id, credential_url, sort_order, created_at FROM certifications WHERE id = #{id} AND resume_id = #{resumeId}

SELECT id, resume_id, name, issuing_organization, issue_date, expiry_date, credential_id, credential_url, sort_order, created_at FROM certifications WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC
SELECT id FROM certifications WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId}
